_comment: Contract for the mascot art. The loader (src/mascot.js) hardcodes this same list; this file is the human-readable source of truth that README.md and the loader agree on. Adding a new expression: add the file, add an entry here, and split its alias in src/mascot.js. (The loader does NOT fetch this file today — that's a deliberate no-extra-network-failure choice; it can be wired to read it if the set needs to grow without touching JS.)
